title: pulicaria salicina
intro: Pulicaria salicina, also known as Marsh Fleabane, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pulicaria salicina include treating digestive issues, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically available in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
